columns.extraction_plan: In the overall population, the addition of abiraterone to SOC improved the median progression-free survival from 2.22 years to 4.46 years. Convert years to months: 4.46 years * 12 months/year = 53.52 months. Therefore, Median PFS (mo) | Overall | Treatment = 53.52

In the overall population, the addition of abiraterone to SOC improved the median progression-free survival from 2.22 years to 4.46 years. Convert years to months: 2.22 years * 12 months/year = 26.64 months. Therefore, Median PFS (mo) | Overall | Control = 26.64
In patients with high metastatic burden, the median PFS was 4.1 years. Convert years to months: 4.1 years * 12 months/year = 49.2 months. Therefore, Median PFS (mo) | High volume | Treatment = 49.2
In patients with high metastatic burden, the median PFS was 1.6 years. Convert years to months: 1.6 years * 12 months/year = 19.2 months. Therefore, Median PFS (mo) | High volume | Control = 19.2
In patients with low metastatic burden, the median PFS was not reached. Therefore, Median PFS (mo) | Low volume | Treatment = Not reached
In patients with low metastatic burden, the median PFS was 2.7 years. Convert years to months: 2.7 years * 12 months/year = 32.4 months. Therefore, Median PFS (mo) | Low volume | Control = 32.4
